description: Currently expanding core skill set into cloud architecture, focusing on Microsoft Azure to build scalable, resilient web applications and APIs. Pursuing hands-on projects with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native deployments.

Mastered modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Angular) alongside robust backends in Python (Flask) and Node.js. Integrated NoSQL databases (MongoDB) for complex data management. Delivered multiple production-grade projects including AI-powered platforms and e-commerce systems.

Established a deep understanding of core programming concepts, data structures, and algorithms. Began journey into structural coding and web technologies. Built first full-stack projects and developed a strong foundation in TypeScript and Python.
